problem_text: In a given year an economy exports X = 100 billion dollars of goods and services and imports M = 120 billion dollars. What are this economy's net exports, and does the economy run a trade surplus or a trade deficit?

content.label: Trade deficit condition
content.applies_when: imports exceed exports, so net exports are negative and the economy runs a trade deficit rather than a trade surplus

content.label: Compute net exports (the trade balance) by subtracting imports from exports, then read off the sign
content.action: subtract imports M from exports X to get net exports NX = X - M, then note the sign of the result
content.purpose: compute net exports and determine whether the economy runs a trade surplus or a trade deficit
